text: best Vegan food....Period!  A friend took us all here for dinner, and had the owner prepare a cheesecake for us that wasn't on the menu, let me tell you, this was better than any non-vegen cheesecake! She changes the menu weekly, but regardless of when you go, you will love the food here!  Everything they make is fabulous!  I'm not vegan, and one guy is a straight carnivore, and he loved his food! this is vegan heaven...matter of fact, this is just a foodie's heaven!  The decor is gorgeous too, its just a lovely spot!
